title: Entire floor lost Wi-Fi

servicenow_seed.description: Twenty-plus callers from the 4th floor report no Wi-Fi. Wired connections work. Other floors unaffected.

correct_steps: Verify caller and capture floor + SSID
Check related incidents - confirm 3+ tickets from same floor
Test wired connection works (rules out DHCP/DNS/identity)
Open or link a parent (major) incident; flag as outage
Notify Incident Commander; escalate to Network Operations with AP/SSID/floor evidence
Send caller communication with current scope and ETA cadence
rationale: Floor-wide Wi-Fi loss is an outage. Move into major-incident workflow: parent incident, comms, and Network Ops takes the technical fix.
hints: Once you see 3+ same-floor tickets, stop troubleshooting individuals.
Wired test rules out everything except the wireless layer.
learning_objectives: Move from incident to major-incident workflow when scope crosses a floor
Drive comms to stakeholders during outages

tool_clues.network: AP-FLOOR-4 cluster: 6 APs offline since 09:42. WLC alarm raised.
tool_clues.service_health: Wired LAN: Healthy. Wireless: Outage on floor 4.
